Petn To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgt For Minor Or Adult Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Continued To Sep-20-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Edward Kelly, Esq. for Petitioner: Allen Shain, present as Guardian at litem for: Max Shain, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
William Waterman, Esq. for Defendant: Golden Gate Kindergarten, Inc. dba Phoebe A. Hearst Preschool Learning Center, is also present in court.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $5,000.00
Costs $1,174.76
A net balance of $18,825.24 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 2200 Chestnut St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 calendar on Sept. 20, 2005 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212 for DISMISSAL.
